ReleaseNotes: Target Topography step: in Rx mode the Target K-Reading is now shown as a computed, read-only value and no longer overwrites the Flat/Steep K-Reading inputs used in K-Values mode. K-Reading fields stay blank until a target has been calculated, and the unused "Detail" button has been removed.

Session Report: the "Calculation Protocol" text section has been removed. The on-screen report, the exported PDF and the printout now show only the figures and summary information, for a cleaner and more focused report.

Engineering Mode — Epi-Link preview: the 3D epithelial-thickness surface now renders smoothly without the previous jagged edge artefacts, uses the correct colour table, and the Input and Abrased curvature maps share a single colour scale so the preview matches the reference rendering.
